member.summary: Base role constants shared across all modules. Each module should define its own RoleConstants in {Module}.Domain project.

member.name: F:BuildingBlocks.Domain.Constants.RoleConstants.RegisteredUsers
member.summary: Base role for all authenticated users. All modules inheriting from BuildingBlocks require this role at minimum.

member.name: P:BuildingBlocks.Domain.DTOs.AggregateRootPagination.PageIndex
member.summary:
Vị trí bắt đầu trang
Mặc định bắt đầu từ 0

member.name: P:BuildingBlocks.Domain.DTOs.AggregateRootPagination.PageSize
member.summary:
Tổng bản ghi muốn lấy
Max size là 100 bản ghi
Nếu lớn hơn 100 thì lấy theo mặc định là 10 bản ghi

member.summary: Checks if user has any role (authenticated with valid roles)

member.summary: Checks if user is denied access (no roles assigned)

member.summary: Checks if user has a specific role

member.summary: Interface cho các entity có thuộc tính Used để lọc theo trạng thái sử dụng

member.name: T:BuildingBlocks.Domain.Interfaces.IJunctionRepository`1
member.summary: Repository for junction entities that don't implement IAggregateRoot. Provides delete operations for entities implementing IMayHaveDelete.

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.Domain.Interfaces.IJunctionRepository`1.DeleteAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Hard-deletes (permanently removes) all junction entities matching the predicate.
member.param: Filter expression for entities to hard-delete
If true, saves changes immediately. If false, caller must save via UnitOfWork.

member.summary: Tổ tiên

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.Domain.Interfaces.IRepository`2.GetQueryableSet(System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Query đã lọc ra đã xoá (IsDeleted), không còn sử dụng (Used) và sắp xếp mới nhất lên đầu trang
member.param: True: chỉ lấy còn sử dụng, False: lấy luôn cả không còn sử dụng

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.Domain.Interfaces.IRepository`2.GetQueryableSet
member.summary: Query đã lọc ra đã xoá (IsDeleted), còn sử dụng (Used = true) và sắp xếp mới nhất lên đầu trang

member.name: T:BuildingBlocks.Domain.ValueTypes.MonthYear
member.summary: Value type representing a month-year combination (MM-yyyy format). Used for UI input where day is not significant, converts to DateOnly for database storage.

member.name: P:BuildingBlocks.Domain.ValueTypes.MonthYear.Month
member.summary: Month component (1-12)

member.name: P:BuildingBlocks.Domain.ValueTypes.MonthYear.Year
member.summary: Year component

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.Domain.ValueTypes.MonthYear.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new MonthYear instance
member.exception: Thrown when month is not between 1 and 12, or year is not between 1 and 9999

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.Domain.ValueTypes.MonthYear.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a "MM-yyyy" formatted string to MonthYear

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.Domain.ValueTypes.MonthYear.TryParse(System.String,BuildingBlocks.Domain.ValueTypes.MonthYear@)
member.summary: Tries to parse a "MM-yyyy" formatted string to MonthYear
member.returns: True if parsing succeeded, false otherwise

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.Domain.ValueTypes.MonthYear.ToDateOnly(System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts to DateOnly for database storage. Note: Caller is responsible for ensuring day is valid for the month (e.g., day 31 for February will throw).
member.param: Day of month (default: 1, always valid for any month)

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.Domain.ValueTypes.MonthYear.ToString
member.summary: Returns string in "MM-yyyy" format

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.Domain.ValueTypes.MonthYear.FromDateOnly(System.DateOnly)
member.summary: Creates a MonthYear from a DateOnly

member.name: P:BuildingBlocks.Domain.ValueTypes.MonthYear.Current
member.summary: Gets current month-year

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.Domain.ValueTypes.MonthYear.op_Implicit(BuildingBlocks.Domain.ValueTypes.MonthYear)~System.DateOnly
member.summary: Implicit conversion to DateOnly (uses day 1)
